content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.21% with mixed sector action - Auto/Metal up, Realty/Bank down. VIX elevated at 18 but easing. Broad tape choppy but earnings-driven names (BHEL, HAL, BANDHANBNK, NAVINFLUOR, SOBHA, ADANIPORTS) showing strong relative strength. Book is well-positioned with 49% deployed and several positions sitting on gains - focus is on managing existing book, not stacking new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23880,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +6.2%, current SL at 1029 is already at breakeven+. Stock consolidating 1031-1051 today after recent rally. Mandate (b): unrealized ≥4%, current SL 1029 already above entry 984. Trail-gap: 1029 vs CMP 1045 = 1.6% gap, within the 1% floor. Holding existing SL — no change needed. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -2.5% as macro hedge. SL 119 (-4.9% from CMP 122) gives the position room. Geopolitical hedge thesis intact with Middle East tensions; gold mid-band but downtrend recent. SL well below entry, no MODIFY warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +2.1%, current SL already at 1710 = breakeven+. CMP 1735, SL 1710 = 1.4% gap, within trail-gap floor. Stock broke out of multi-month range +4.66% today on Q4 beat + dividend. No change to SL/target — emit HOLD instead since values match stored. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -2.0%, CMP 13470 vs SL 13400 = 0.5% from stop. Auto sector +0.69% today, MARUTI +1.17% recovering from intraday low. Q4 PAT -6.45% YoY is the overhang but April record sales support floor. SL 13400 holding well above intraday low 13360 — keep tight defensive SL, no loosening."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.8%, sector leader today +3.35% on Q4 PAT +68% YoY beat. SL 204 vs CMP 206.41 = 1.2% gap. Stock consolidating near 52w high after recent 39% YTD run. Gap is tight but acceptable; do not tighten further given 1% trail-gap floor and recent volatility."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4555.00,
      "new_target": 4900.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.1%, CMP 4623 vs SL 4555 = 1.5% gap. Stock surged +6.56% on new CMD appointment + Dornier order. Q4 results May 14 = binary event in 7 sessions, beyond 3-session rule. SL already above entry-adjacent. No change — emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.4%, CMP 374 vs SL 372 = 0.5% — VERY tight, intraday faded from high 388 to current 374. Q4 PAT 2.5x YoY is in, no upcoming binary. Stock failing to hold gains is concerning but SL already protects. If it triggers, it triggers cleanly. No tightening — gap below 1% floor already would need loosening, which is not allowed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.7% after big intraday fade from 1577 high to 1469. Q4 results announced today (PAT +124% YoY, Rs 6 dividend, FY26 pre-sales record). Big intraday wick is post-earnings disappointment vs expectations — concerning. SL 1420 = -3.3% gives room for the volatility to settle. Bullish research consensus (4 buys vs 1 sell) intact. Hold to SL or recovery."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.2%. CMP 6968 vs SL 6650 = 4.8% gap. Q4 PAT +130% YoY, EBITDA margin 32.6%, Chemours June/July catalyst. 7.7x volume surge on entry day signals institutional accumulation. Position needs more time to develop — keep wider SL to avoid stop on noise. P&L not yet at +2% trail-mandate threshold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1029 already above entry 984. Trail-gap 1.6% adequate. Let position run toward target 1110."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge thesis intact; SL 119 sufficient cushion."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1710 already at breakeven+. Q4 beat + dividend supportive. Let breakout extend toward 1820."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 13400 tight at 0.5%; do not loosen. Auto sector strength providing some floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Sector leader today; SL 204 holding."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 14 - monitor approach; current SL 4555 acceptable."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 372 already very tight (0.5%). Will trigger cleanly if breakout fails."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Big intraday wick post-Q4 disconcerting; SL 1420 gives space for volatility to settle."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 + Chemours catalyst; let position develop with current 4.8% SL cushion."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "MOTILALOFS (+25% operating PAT YoY, cheapest broker peer at 24x P/E, Bullish Engulfing daily) is the cleanest non-held setup but Financial Services exposure already meaningful via PNBHOUSING + BANDHANBNK + insurance proximity. ICICIPRULI Q4 margin beat but retail APE only +3.7% lagging peers - pass. LALPATHLAB / TATATECH gap-up extended - missed entry, pass. HFCL extended on news - day-trader name, pass. FMCG defensives (COLPAL) showing sector rotation but Q3 fundamentals weak - pass. VEDL / metals cluster strength noted but governance overhangs.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book sits at 49% deployed across 9 positions, well-diversified across sectors (Financials, Auto, Capital Goods/Defence, Realty, Chemicals, Services, Gold). Three positions have SLs already at/above breakeven (PNBHOUSING, ADANIPORTS, HAL). Tight SLs on MARUTI/BHEL/BANDHANBNK mean any one could stop out cleanly today without portfolio impact. No new entries this tick - existing book is the work. Daily P&L +0.41%, controlled exposure. Will reassess on next pulse if MOTILALOFS or a clean second-tier earnings setup emerges and capital frees up via SL exits."
}
